mainEntity.name: Cost to optimize a Houston firm for ChatGPT lawyer recommendations?
mainEntity.text: Cost to optimize a Houston firm for ChatGPT lawyer recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: $2,000-$10,000 initially for Houston SEO, reviews management, and content; $500-$2,000/month ongoing for top ChatGPT visibility.

suggestedAnswer.text: Breakdown: $1k site audit, $3k link building, review tools $100/mo. Houston's oil/gas niche adds value. ROI via leads; budget for ethics compliance. Avoid black-hat tactics risking disbarment.

name: Costs for Houston ChatGPT Optimization
description: $2,000-$10,000 initially for Houston SEO, reviews management, and content; $500-$2,000/month ongoing for top ChatGPT visibility.
